# Roam Research Documentation

> Markdown mirror of public Roam Research graphs (developer-documentation, help),
> refreshed automatically, plus live-introspected TypeScript definitions for
> window.roamAlphaAPI (v1.1.3) and copy-pasteable examples. Sources of truth: the
> public graphs and a running Roam Research session; regenerated on a schedule.
> Source & contributions: https://github.com/sweenzor/roam-docs

Last export: 2026-07-21T07:45:19.816Z

## Developer documentation

- [Developer Hub](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/developer-hub.md): Entry point / map of all Roam Research developer documentation
- [Roam Alpha API](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-alpha-api.md): The frontend JS API (window.roamAlphaAPI): datalog q/pull, block & page CRUD, UI control, file storage
- [Roam Depot/Extension API](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-depot-extension-api.md): Extension API passed to Depot extensions (settings panels, commands, lifecycle)
- [Roam Depot/Extensions](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-depot-extensions.md): How to build, test and publish Roam Depot extensions
- [roam/css](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-css.md): Theming Roam Research with custom CSS via the roam/css page
- [roam/js](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-js.md): Running custom JavaScript in a graph via roam/js blocks
- [roam/cljs](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-cljs.md): Running ClojureScript in a graph
- [roam/render](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-render.md): Custom components rendered inside blocks (ClojureScript/Reagent)
- [Roam Backend API (Beta)](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-backend-api-beta.md): Official REST API: datalog q / pull / pull-many + write actions over HTTP with roam-graph-tokens
- [Roam Append API](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-append-api.md): Append-only HTTP API for capture (works with encrypted graphs)
- [Yet-to-release updates](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/yet-to-release-updates.md): API changes announced but not yet released
- [Available Libraries](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/available-libraries.md): Official SDKs and community libraries
- [Local API](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/local-api.md): Local HTTP API exposed by the Roam Research desktop app
- [Contact Us](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/contact-us.md): How to reach the Roam Research developer team
- [developer-documentation/llms-full.txt](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/llms-full.txt): All of the developer-documentation graph in one file

## API reference

- [roam-alpha-api.d.ts](https://roamdocs.fyi/types/roam-alpha-api.d.ts): TypeScript definitions for window.roamAlphaAPI — all 132 live-introspected functions (2 newly-discovered functions not yet typed — see the llms-full.txt function inventory appendix)

## Examples

- [01-queries.js](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/01-queries.js)
- [02-writing-blocks.js](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/02-writing-blocks.js)
- [03-extension-skeleton.js](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/03-extension-skeleton.js)
- [04-backend-api.sh](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/04-backend-api.sh)
- [05-backend-api.js](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/05-backend-api.js)
- [06-render-components.js](https://roamdocs.fyi/examples/06-render-components.js)

## Help & user documentation

- [Welcome to Roam](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/welcome-to-roam.md): Getting started ℹ️ (hint... shift-click the links in blue below 😉) .box
- [Install Roam](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/install-roam.md): Install Roam Mobile (iOS and Android)
- [Change Log](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/change-log.md): Updating Roam
- [FAQ](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/faq.md): Account
- [White Paper](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/white-paper.md): Abstract. Roam is an online workspace for organizing and evaluating knowledge. The system is built on a directed graph, which frees it from 
- [Privacy Policy](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/privacy-policy.md): TLDR: Roam does not own your data, nor do we sell it to others or use it for advertising. We will never read or access your private notes wi
- [Terms and Conditions](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/terms-and-conditions.md): TLDR: Roam does not own your data, nor do we sell it to others or use it for advertising. We will never read or access your private notes wi
- [help/llms-full.txt](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/llms-full.txt): All of the help graph in one file

## Optional

- [Roam Alpha API v2](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/roam-alpha-api-v2.md): Getting Started

- [Datomic Alpha API](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/datomic-alpha-api.md): Important Note: This is the documentation for the Depreciated (& inactive) Datomic API. We have a new API! see it here, Roam Backend API (Be
- [iFrame Components](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/iframe-components.md): Important Note: This is Depreciated, it still most likely works but we will not be continuing it's development
- [Attributes Data Model](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/attributes-data-model.md): Introduction: it's a hypergraph
- [datalog-block-query](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/datalog-block-query.md): Older Loom videos
- [Developer documentation release notes](https://roamdocs.fyi/developer-documentation/release-notes.md): Dated daily-note updates (newest first)
- [Commentarii Roamani](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/commentarii-roamani.md): Hello Again, Roamans -- April 5th, 2025
- [roam/templates](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-templates.md): Dev docs .h
- [Diagram](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/diagram.md): Diagrams are an extra dimension of the blocks in your graph. You can lay your thoughts out in a 2D infinite canvas, group and connect ideas.
- [Roam-specific :q additions](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-specific-q-additions.md): If you're a dev (or even if not!), you can use our very flexible query features to do the kinds of specialized queries you want
- [Themes](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/themes.md): .--
- [Semantic search (Experimental)](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/semantic-search-experimental.md): Roam's regular search matches the words you type. Semantic search matches meaning: it can find your notes about __insomnia__ when you search
- [Block References](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/block-references.md): One of Roam's most powerful, flagship features
- [What You Can't Say](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/what-you-can-t-say.md): Essay Paul Graham
- [Formatting](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/formatting.md): Bold
- [Key Commands](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/key-commands.md): Roam is built to be driven from the keyboard. These are the commands worth learning first.
- [Navigation](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/navigation.md): If you're used to clicking hyperlinks when browsing the web, you already know how to navigate in Roam! Click on any page reference or extern
- [Beating the Averages](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/beating-the-averages.md): Paul Graham Essay
- [Kanban](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/kanban.md): .--
- [JSON Schema](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/json-schema.md): Description
- [Examples of :q query blocks](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/examples-of-q-query-blocks.md): :q queries can be used to display the results of datomic/datascript queries in your Roam graph
- [Query](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/query.md): A query block collects every block in your graph that matches conditions you give it: a saved search that lives right in your notes.
- [Apple Shortcuts/Speak to Roam](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/apple-shortcuts-speak-to-roam.md): An Official Capture Apple Shortcut, built by the Roam team!
- [/ Commands](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/commands.md): The / Commands give you access to a variety of functions in Roam
- [Block Context Menu](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/block-context-menu.md): The Block Context Menu is the menu that gets pulled up when you right click the circle bullets on any block, it brings up a list of common f
- [Features](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/features.md): Fundamentals
- [Pipedream Workflows](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/pipedream-workflows.md): Pipedream is a no-code / low-code platform where one can build powerful workflows that connect your applications, services, APIs, and more
- [Blocks](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/blocks.md): Each bullet you see is a __block__, and we write them inside pages like this one.
- [TODO/DONE](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/todo-done.md): TODOs are the core of task management. We have been using them in our bullet journals, task apps, and now... Roam.
- [roam/agent guidelines](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-agent-guidelines.md): Guidelines for AI agents working on this graph, Roam's public help documentation. Real users read every word. Follow these for every read an
- [Graphs and Settings](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/graphs-and-settings.md): Team GIFs::
- [Callouts](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/callouts.md): Callouts are styled Blockquotes with a type-specific icon and color.
- [Why you can't say](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/why-you-can-t-say.md): Full Text
- [Encrypted Graphs](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/encrypted-graphs.md): Limitations of encrypted graphs
- [Zapier Integration](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/zapier-integration.md): Zapier lets you connect Roam Research to 6,000+ other web services. Automated connections called Zaps, set up in minutes with no coding, can
- [Table](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/table.md): Tables display blocks as a grid you can edit in place: click into cells, sort columns, resize, and paste to and from spreadsheets.
- [Mermaid Diagrams](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/mermaid-diagrams.md): An embedded version of MermaidJS, create mermaid diagrams inside of Roam!
- [Create API Tokens](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/create-api-tokens.md): (how to create Roam API tokens for a graph)
- [Security](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/security.md): Security Policy
- [Right Sidebar](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/right-sidebar.md): Roam Team Videos::
- [Roam Depot](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-depot.md): Roam Depot is Roam's built-in marketplace for extensions: add-ons built by the community that add new features to Roam.
- [Working with AI Tools](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/working-with-ai-tools.md): These guidelines apply to every way of connecting an AI to your graphs: Roam MCP, Local MCP, and the Roam CLI.
- [Sharing](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/sharing.md): Sharing controls who can see and edit a Hosted Graph: the whole graph, specific people, or single pages.
- [Updating Roam](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/updating-roam.md): How do I update Roam?
- [Developer Documentation](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/developer-documentation.md): If you're a developer who'd like to build extensions for Roam or connect stuff to Roam, please checkout our developer-documentation graph
- [Search](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/search.md): Find or create page Search (the search bar)
- [Courses](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/courses.md): Request to be featured
- [Roam Reader](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-reader.md): Roam Reader is a Chrome extension for reading on the web with Roam beside you: highlight, tag, and comment on an article, and your notes lan
- [Advanced Search](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/advanced-search.md): Advanced Search is Roam's full search view: a bigger version of the search bar, with a results list, a preview pane, and filters (if Better 
- [Articles](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/articles.md): Request to be featured
- [Tag Styles](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/tag-styles.md): Links and tags whose name begins with a . add a css class to the roam block that they are on
- [Task Management](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/task-management.md): Community Videos::
- [All Graphs Page](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/all-graphs-page.md): The All Graphs page lists every graph you have. It's Roam's home screen, and where new graphs get created.
- [Comments](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/comments.md): Comments let you and your collaborators discuss a block without editing it: questions, feedback, or side notes that stay out of the text its
- [Filter](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/filter.md): .--
- [Welcome to Roam v2](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/welcome-to-roam-v2.md): Quick Start
- [Pages](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/pages.md): Team GIFs::
- [roam/render](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-render.md)
- [Roam MCP](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-mcp.md): Roam MCP connects AI tools like Claude and ChatGPT to your Roam graphs. The AI can search your notes, read pages, and write new blocks, with
- [Roam Mobile](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-mobile.md): Roam Mobile is the native app for iPhone, iPad, and Android. Install Roam has the store links.
- [File Manager](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/file-manager.md): Every image, audio file, PDF, and other file you upload is stored with your graph. The File Manager shows them all in one place.
- [Graph Overview](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/graph-overview.md): .--
- [PDF Annotator](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/pdf-annotator.md): Upload a PDF into any block and Roam becomes a reader and annotator: highlight passages, tag them, and hang notes off them.
- [Advanced Block Reference Search](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/advanced-block-reference-search.md): A search that works the way your outline does: drill down toward a block level by level, then drop a ((block reference)) to it right where y
- [Graph History](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/graph-history.md): Graph History lets you open your graph exactly as it was at any past moment, all the way back to the day it was created.
- [Pomodoro timer](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/pomodoro-timer.md): Creating a Pomodoro timer is incredibly easy! Here's how:
- [Hosted Graph](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/hosted-graph.md): What does it mean?
- [Command Palette](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/command-palette.md): One searchable list of just about everything Roam can do: open it, type a few letters, hit Enter.
- [Daily Notes](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/daily-notes.md): Daily Notes are the backbone of the Roam experience.
- [Settings](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/settings.md): All of Roam's settings live in one panel. Open it from the ⋯ menu in the top right, or run Open settings from the Command Palette.
- [Better search (Experimental)](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/better-search-experimental.md): A new search engine for Roam, currently opt-in while it's experimental.
- [Customizable Hotkeys](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/customizable-hotkeys.md): Most of Roam's commands can be given hotkeys of your own (or have their defaults changed) in Settings → Hotkeys.
- [Precise Links](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/precise-links.md): Example
- [Local MCP](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/local-mcp.md): The local MCP server connects AI tools running on your computer, like Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor, to your graphs through 
- [Extensions](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/extensions.md): CSS
- [Zettelkasten](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/zettelkasten.md): Roam Team Videos::
- [Audio Player](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/audio-player.md): You can upload and embed audio into Roam! Check out this interactive demo on Conor White-Sullivan describing Roam as Excel
- [Global search](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/global-search.md): Global search finds pages and blocks across all of your graphs at once, not just the one you have open.
- [Roam Help](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-help.md): Welcome to Roam
- [Roam CLI](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-cli.md): The Roam CLI runs the same tools as Local MCP as terminal commands: list graphs, search, read pages, and more.
- [roam/css](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-css.md): .rm-g
- [Project Management](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/project-management.md): Community Videos::
- [Personal CRM](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/personal-crm.md): Community Videos::
- [Upload Files](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/upload-files.md): You can upload and embed files in Roam, including audio, PDFs, and images, so you can access files right on the spot
- [Calculator](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/calculator.md): Calculates basic arithmetic.
- [Roam Query Builder](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-query-builder.md): The Query Builder is a visual editor for Query blocks: build and refine a query with menus and pickers instead of writing the syntax by hand
- [News and Press](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/news-and-press.md)
- [Beginner's Guide](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/beginner-s-guide.md): A short but comprehensive guide
- [Delete Graph](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/delete-graph.md): Deleting a graph is permanent. Once deleted, it cannot be recovered.
- [Community](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/community.md): Roam Slack
- [Miscellaneous](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/miscellaneous.md): Wiki
- [Video Embed](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/video-embed.md): You can embed videos in Roam directly, without going to a separate page to access them
- [Templates](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/templates.md): Team GIFS::
- [All Pages](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/all-pages.md): Every page in your graph in one sortable list, with columns for mentions, word count, and when each page was created and last updated.
- [Workflows](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/workflows.md): Journaling
- [Images](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/images.md): You can include images on Roam in these two ways
- [Journaling](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/journaling.md): Articles::
- [Mentions](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/mentions.md): Mentions help you pull information (i.e., References) right on any Blocks, without you having to open extra windows or sidebars to access th
- [Longform writing](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/longform-writing.md): Community Videos::
- [Research](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/research.md): Roam Team Videos::
- [Export](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/export.md): Markdown Export
- [Graph Homepage](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/graph-homepage.md): A graph can have a homepage: a page that opens automatically whenever the graph loads, instead of today's Daily Notes.
- [Studying](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/studying.md): Community Videos::
- [Long Videos](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/long-videos.md): Implementing a Digital Zettelkasten using Block References in Roam Research with Beau Haan by Robert Haisfield
- [Date picker](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/date-picker.md): Date picker helps you pick a date's page by showing you a calendar
- [Bidirectional linking](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/bidirectional-linking.md): It doesn't matter what page you've written a note on, if you mention an idea, every place where you mentioned that idea will get collected u
- [Code Block](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/code-block.md): You can include code in different programming languages in Roam, for example
- [Delete Account](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/delete-account.md): Deleting your account deletes every graph you're the only admin of, along with the files uploaded to them.
- [Notable Graphs](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/notable-graphs.md): Holy Omniscience Graph
- [Spanish](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/spanish.md): ✏️Cómo TOMAR NOTAS con ROAM RESEARCH & ZETTELKASTEN | Tutorial en español by Emowe Aprendizaje

- [Meeting notes](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/meeting-notes.md): Community Videos::
- [Console Logs](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/console-logs.md): To capture console logs
- [Cancelling your membership during your free trial](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/cancelling-your-membership-during-your-free-trial.md): Sign In to your Roam account, with the email address you used at sign up:
- [Current time](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/current-time.md): Current time displays the current time in your time zone, it's great for tracking time while writing daily logs
- [Adding soft line breaks in a block](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/adding-soft-line-breaks-in-a-block.md): Each individual bullet point in a page in Roam is referred to as a block. When you press enter Roam creates a new block on the next line in 
- [Page References](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/page-references.md): Page references are links to Pages in your graph
- [Character count](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/character-count.md): Character count counts the number of characters in a block, for example
- [Word count](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/word-count.md): The word count component counts the number of words in a block, for example
- [Desktop App](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/desktop-app.md): The desktop app is the full Roam in a standalone window, for Mac, Windows, and Linux. Install Roam covers the download.
- [Why Roam?](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/why-roam.md): This thread of threads on Twitter answers the question of "Why Roam?" pretty well, if not succinctly 😉
- [Chinese](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/chinese.md): Community Videos::
- [Engelbart 1962 - Augmenting Human Intellect](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/engelbart-1962-augmenting-human-intellect.md): Notes by Joshua Brown
- [Roam Support](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-support.md): You can always reach us by
- [Left Sidebar](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/left-sidebar.md): Star/unstar pages
- [Attributes](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/attributes.md): Community Videos::
- [Import](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/import.md): Importing JSON
- [Wiki](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/wiki.md): Community Videos::
- [Kids](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/kids.md): Community Videos::
- [Slider](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/slider.md): Sliders are good for representing data on a scale, and are especially useful for polls on Multiplayer graphs!
- [Version Control](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/version-control.md): Version control helps you create different versions of of the same block, often used when you want to make multiple drafts of something
- [Encrypted Block](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/encrypted-block.md): Encrypted block creates encrypted text that can only be unlocked with a secret password
- [Numbered List Extension](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/numbered-list-extension.md): Thank you for installing the Numbered List extension for Roam Research. This page has been automatically generated to allow creation of a Sm
- [Today](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/today.md): The "today" function auto generates today's daily notes page, it will either give you a static result, or a variable result ("today" will al
- [Russian](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/russian.md): Community Videos::
- [Tomorrow](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/tomorrow.md): The "tomorrow" function auto generates tomorrow's daily notes page, it will either give you a static result, or a variable result ("tomorrow
- [Korean](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/korean.md)
- [Tags](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/tags.md): Tags are just Page References that are styled a bit differently (light grey font color) so that the tag is not as prominent
- [Roam Slack](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/roam-slack.md): We have a thriving community on Slack!
- [Alexander Rink](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/alexander-rink.md): Roam Depot Extensions
- [Zen Mode](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/zen-mode.md): Zen Mode (or Focus Mode) strips the interface down to just what you're writing. One command hides everything else, and toggling it again put
- [Latex](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/latex.md): Description::
- [Linked References](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/linked-references.md): Description::
- [Help & user documentation release notes](https://roamdocs.fyi/help/release-notes.md): Dated daily-note updates (newest first)
- [llms-full.txt (all graphs)](https://roamdocs.fyi/llms-full.txt): Every graph concatenated into one large file
